summary: Implement an official GESP PDF parser that extracts structured problem metadata, question type, page references, short evidence snippets, and parser provenance without storing full PDF text.
approach: Use the Phase 2 official source index as the PDF source of truth.
Temporarily download selected official PDFs and verify sha256 before parsing.
Extract text through an isolated macOS PDFKit Swift extractor, keeping the extraction layer replaceable by a Docker poppler extractor later.
Persist only structured metadata and short evidence snippets.
Validate that C++ level 5 official PDFs produce selection, judgment, and programming problem records.

confidence.pressure_pass: PDFKit works on the local macOS workspace; backend and CI should replace it with a Dockerized extractor when needed.

notes: This phase does not classify algorithm domains or knowledge points.
This phase does not persist full PDF text.
Default parsing scope is the latest official true-question session; all sessions can be parsed with --all-sessions.
